additional_questions.question_en: What is the definition of Availability in information security?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual es la definicion de Disponibilidad en seguridad de la informacion?
options_en: Assurance information is accessible only to authorized users
Assurance that systems are accessible when required by authorized users
options_es: Garantia de que la informacion es accesible solo para usuarios autorizados
Garantia de que los sistemas estan accesibles cuando los usuarios autorizados lo requieren
additional_questions.explanation_en: Availability is the assurance that systems responsible for delivering, storing, and processing information are accessible when required.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Disponibilidad es la garantia de que los sistemas responsables de entregar, almacenar y procesar informacion estan accesibles cuando se requieren.

additional_questions.question_en: What measures can maintain data availability?
additional_questions.question_es: Que medidas pueden mantener la disponibilidad de datos?
options_en: Redundant systems, antivirus, and DDoS prevention
options_es: Sistemas redundantes, antivirus y prevencion de DDoS
additional_questions.explanation_en: Availability measures include redundant disk arrays, clustered machines, antivirus software, and DDoS prevention systems.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Las medidas de disponibilidad incluyen arrays de discos redundantes, maquinas en cluster, software antivirus y sistemas de prevencion de DDoS.

options_en: Hackers who may violate laws but without malicious intent
options_es: Hackers que pueden violar leyes pero sin intencion maliciosa
additional_questions.explanation_en: Gray hats work both offensively and defensively, sometimes violating laws without malicious intent.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Los gray hats trabajan tanto ofensiva como defensivamente, a veces violando leyes sin intencion maliciosa.

options_en: Form of activism where hackers break into systems as an act of protest
options_es: Forma de activismo donde hackers irrumpen en sistemas como acto de protesta
additional_questions.explanation_en: Hacktivism is a form of activism in which hackers break into government or corporate systems as an act of protest.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Hacktivismo es una forma de activismo donde hackers irrumpen en sistemas gubernamentales o corporativos como acto de protesta.

additional_questions.question_es: Que es un vector de ataque?
options_en: Medium through which attacker gains access by exploiting vulnerabilities
options_es: Medio a traves del cual un atacante obtiene acceso explotando vulnerabilidades
additional_questions.explanation_en: An attack vector is a medium through which an attacker gains access to a system by exploiting identified vulnerabilities.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Un vector de ataque es un medio a traves del cual un atacante obtiene acceso a un sistema explotando vulnerabilidades identificadas.

additional_questions.question_en: What is Misconfiguration according to the courseware?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es Misconfiguration segun el temario?
options_en: The most common vulnerability mainly caused by human error
options_es: La vulnerabilidad mas comun causada principalmente por error humano
additional_questions.explanation_en: Misconfiguration is the most common vulnerability and is mainly caused by human error.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Misconfiguration es la vulnerabilidad mas comun y es causada principalmente por error humano.

additional_questions.explanation_en: MTTR = Mean Time To Respond/Recover - average time to respond to and recover from an incident.
additional_questions.explanation_es: MTTR = Tiempo Medio para Responder/Recuperar - tiempo promedio para responder y recuperarse de un incidente.

additional_questions.question_en: What is the purpose of tabletop exercises?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual es el proposito de los ejercicios de mesa (tabletop)?
options_en: Simulate incident scenarios to test response plans
Train new employees on basic IT
options_es: Reemplazar la respuesta real a incidentes
Simular escenarios de incidentes para probar planes de respuesta
Entrenar nuevos empleados en TI basica
additional_questions.explanation_en: Tabletop exercises simulate incident scenarios to test and improve response plans without real impact.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Los ejercicios de mesa simulan escenarios de incidentes para probar y mejorar planes de respuesta sin impacto real.

additional_questions.question_en: According to NERC 1307, how long should incident records be retained?
additional_questions.question_es: Segun NERC 1307, por cuanto tiempo se deben retener los registros de incidentes?
additional_questions.explanation_en: NERC 1307 requires retaining records of incidents and cyber security incidents for three calendar years.
additional_questions.explanation_es: NERC 1307 requiere retener registros de incidentes y incidentes de ciberseguridad por tres anos calendario.

options_en: Standard for Information Security Incident Management
options_es: Estandar general de gobierno de TI
Estandar para Gestion de Incidentes de Seguridad de la Informacion
additional_questions.explanation_en: ISO/IEC 27035 is a standard for Information Security Incident Management defining recommendations and best practices.
additional_questions.explanation_es: ISO/IEC 27035 es un estandar para Gestion de Incidentes de Seguridad de la Informacion que define recomendaciones y mejores practicas.

options_en: Standard for identification, collection, acquisition and preservation of digital evidence
options_es: Estandar de seguridad en la nube
Estandar para identificacion, recoleccion, adquisicion y preservacion de evidencia digital
additional_questions.explanation_en: ISO/IEC 27037 provides guidelines for handling digital evidence to maintain integrity acceptable by court of law.
additional_questions.explanation_es: ISO/IEC 27037 proporciona guias para manejar evidencia digital manteniendo integridad aceptable por tribunales.

additional_questions.question_en: What should you do if a computer is in OFF state at the crime scene?
additional_questions.question_es: Que debe hacer si una computadora esta APAGADA en la escena del crimen?
options_en: Turn it ON to check contents
additional_questions.explanation_en: If a computer is OFF, do not turn it ON - this could alter evidence or trigger destructive processes.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Si una computadora esta APAGADA, no la encienda - esto podria alterar evidencia o disparar procesos destructivos.

additional_questions.question_en: What should you do if a computer is ON at the crime scene?
additional_questions.question_es: Que debe hacer si una computadora esta ENCENDIDA en la escena del crimen?
options_en: Take a photo of the screen and document
options_es: Tomar foto de la pantalla y documentar
additional_questions.explanation_en: If computer is ON, take a photo of the monitor screen and document what you observe.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Si la computadora esta ENCENDIDA, tome foto de la pantalla del monitor y documente lo que observa.

additional_questions.question_en: What devices should first responders consider as evidence sources besides computers?
additional_questions.question_es: Que dispositivos deben considerar los primeros respondedores como fuentes de evidencia ademas de computadoras?
options_en: Audio/video recorders, cameras, GPS, access cards
options_es: Grabadoras de audio/video, camaras, GPS, tarjetas de acceso
additional_questions.explanation_en: Evidence sources include audio/video recorders, cameras, surveillance cameras, access cards, and GPS devices.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Las fuentes de evidencia incluyen grabadoras de audio/video, camaras, camaras de vigilancia, tarjetas de acceso y dispositivos GPS.

additional_questions.question_en: What is the correct order of volatility from MOST to LEAST volatile?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual es el orden correcto de volatilidad de MAS a MENOS volatil?
options_es: Disco duro, RAM, cache de CPU
Registros/cache de CPU, RAM, Disco duro
RAM, cache de CPU, Disco duro
Logs de red, RAM, cache de CPU
additional_questions.explanation_en: Order: CPU registers/cache (most volatile), RAM, Hard drive (least volatile among these).
additional_questions.explanation_es: Orden: Registros/cache de CPU (mas volatil), RAM, Disco duro (menos volatil entre estos).

additional_questions.question_en: What is the difference between a virus and a worm?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual es la diferencia entre un virus y un gusano?
options_en: Viruses need host files; worms spread independently
Worms need host files; viruses spread independently
options_es: Los virus necesitan archivos host; los gusanos se propagan independientemente
Los gusanos necesitan archivos host; los virus se propagan independientemente
additional_questions.explanation_en: Viruses require host files to spread; worms can spread independently through networks.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Los virus requieren archivos host para propagarse; los gusanos pueden propagarse independientemente a traves de redes.

additional_questions.explanation_en: A Trojan is malware disguised as legitimate software that performs malicious actions when executed.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Un Troyano es malware disfrazado de software legitimo que realiza acciones maliciosas cuando se ejecuta.

options_en: Malware that encrypts files and demands payment for decryption
options_es: Malware que cifra archivos y exige pago para descifrarlos
additional_questions.explanation_en: Ransomware encrypts victim's files and demands a ransom to provide the decryption key.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Ransomware cifra los archivos de la victima y exige un rescate para proporcionar la clave de descifrado.

additional_questions.question_es: Que es el analisis estatico de malware?
options_en: Analyzing malware code without executing it
options_es: Analizar codigo del malware sin ejecutarlo
additional_questions.explanation_en: Static analysis examines malware code, structure, and characteristics without executing it.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El analisis estatico examina el codigo, estructura y caracteristicas del malware sin ejecutarlo.

additional_questions.question_en: What TCP ports should be monitored for ransomware according to the courseware?
additional_questions.question_es: Que puertos TCP deben monitorearse para ransomware segun el temario?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Monitor TCP ports like RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol) and SMB that ransomware uses to infect systems.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Monitorear puertos TCP como RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol) y SMB que el ransomware usa para infectar sistemas.

additional_questions.explanation_en: Vishing is voice phishing - social engineering attacks conducted via phone calls.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Vishing es phishing por voz - ataques de ingenieria social realizados via llamadas telefonicas.

additional_questions.explanation_en: Smishing is SMS phishing - phishing attacks conducted via text messages.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Smishing es phishing por SMS - ataques de phishing realizados via mensajes de texto.

options_en: Targeted phishing directed at specific individuals or organizations
options_es: Phishing dirigido a individuos u organizaciones especificas
additional_questions.explanation_en: Spear phishing is highly targeted phishing directed at specific individuals or organizations.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Spear phishing es phishing altamente dirigido a individuos u organizaciones especificas.

options_en: Email content has not been altered using digital signatures
options_es: Que el contenido del email no ha sido alterado usando firmas digitales
additional_questions.explanation_en: DKIM (DomainKeys Identified Mail) uses digital signatures to verify email content hasn't been altered.
additional_questions.explanation_es: DKIM (DomainKeys Identified Mail) usa firmas digitales para verificar que el contenido del email no ha sido alterado.

additional_questions.question_en: What are the three types of DDoS attacks?
additional_questions.question_es: Cuales son los tres tipos de ataques DDoS?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Three types: Volumetric (bandwidth), Protocol (TCP/UDP), Application Layer (HTTP).
additional_questions.explanation_es: Tres tipos: Volumetrico (ancho de banda), Protocolo (TCP/UDP), Capa de Aplicacion (HTTP).

options_en: Attack that associates attacker's MAC with another host's IP to intercept traffic
options_es: Ataque que asocia la MAC del atacante con la IP de otro host para interceptar trafico
additional_questions.explanation_en: ARP Spoofing associates the attacker's MAC address with another host's IP to intercept network traffic.
additional_questions.explanation_es: ARP Spoofing asocia la direccion MAC del atacante con la IP de otro host para interceptar trafico de red.

options_en: Cisco protocol for collecting IP traffic flow information
options_es: Protocolo de Cisco para recolectar informacion de flujos de trafico IP
additional_questions.explanation_en: NetFlow is a Cisco protocol for collecting information about IP traffic flows in the network.
additional_questions.explanation_es: NetFlow es un protocolo de Cisco para recolectar informacion sobre flujos de trafico IP en la red.

options_en: Standard awareness document for web application security risks
options_es: Documento estandar de concientizacion sobre riesgos de seguridad de aplicaciones web
additional_questions.explanation_en: OWASP Top 10 is a standard awareness document representing the most critical web application security risks.
additional_questions.explanation_es: OWASP Top 10 es un documento estandar de concientizacion que representa los riesgos de seguridad de aplicaciones web mas criticos.

options_en: XSS where payload is reflected off web server in response
options_es: XSS donde el payload se refleja del servidor web en la respuesta
additional_questions.explanation_en: Reflected XSS occurs when the malicious script is reflected off the web server in the immediate response.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Reflected XSS ocurre cuando el script malicioso se refleja del servidor web en la respuesta inmediata.

options_en: XSS where vulnerability exists in client-side scripts modifying DOM
options_es: XSS donde la vulnerabilidad existe en scripts del lado cliente que modifican el DOM
additional_questions.explanation_en: DOM-based XSS occurs when the vulnerability exists in client-side scripts that modify the page's DOM.
additional_questions.explanation_es: DOM-based XSS ocurre cuando la vulnerabilidad existe en scripts del lado cliente que modifican el DOM de la pagina.

additional_questions.question_es: Que es un ataque de Directory Traversal?
options_en: Attack using ../ to access files outside allowed web directory
options_es: Ataque usando ../ para acceder a archivos fuera del directorio web permitido
additional_questions.explanation_en: Directory Traversal uses ../ sequences to access files outside the permitted web directory.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Directory Traversal usa secuencias ../ para acceder a archivos fuera del directorio web permitido.

additional_questions.question_en: What are the three cloud service models?
additional_questions.question_es: Cuales son los tres modelos de servicio en la nube?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Three service models: IaaS (Infrastructure), PaaS (Platform), SaaS (Software) as a Service.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Tres modelos de servicio: IaaS (Infraestructura), PaaS (Plataforma), SaaS (Software) como Servicio.

options_en: Cloud Security Posture Management - identifies misconfigurations
options_es: Cloud Security Posture Management - identifica misconfiguraciones
additional_questions.explanation_en: CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management) identifies misconfigurations in cloud environments.
additional_questions.explanation_es: CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management) identifica misconfiguraciones en entornos de nube.

additional_questions.question_en: In AWS, what is the difference between CloudWatch and CloudTrail?
additional_questions.question_es: En AWS, cual es la diferencia entre CloudWatch y CloudTrail?
options_en: CloudWatch monitors performance; CloudTrail logs API calls
CloudTrail monitors performance; CloudWatch logs API calls
options_es: CloudWatch monitorea rendimiento; CloudTrail registra llamadas a API
CloudTrail monitorea rendimiento; CloudWatch registra llamadas a API
additional_questions.explanation_en: CloudWatch monitors performance metrics; CloudTrail logs all AWS API calls for auditing.
additional_questions.explanation_es: CloudWatch monitorea metricas de rendimiento; CloudTrail registra todas las llamadas a API de AWS para auditoria.

options_en: Employee whose credentials have been stolen by external attacker
options_es: Empleado cuyas credenciales han sido robadas por un atacante externo
additional_questions.explanation_en: A Compromised Insider is someone whose credentials have been stolen and used by external attackers.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Un Insider Comprometido es alguien cuyas credenciales han sido robadas y usadas por atacantes externos.

options_en: Data Loss Prevention - technology preventing data leakage
options_es: Data Loss Prevention - tecnologia que previene fuga de datos
additional_questions.explanation_en: DLP (Data Loss Prevention) is technology that prevents sensitive data from being leaked.
additional_questions.explanation_es: DLP (Data Loss Prevention) es tecnologia que previene que datos sensibles sean filtrados.

options_en: Privileged Access Management - controls and audits privileged access
options_es: Privileged Access Management - controla y audita acceso privilegiado
additional_questions.explanation_en: PAM (Privileged Access Management) is a system for controlling and auditing privileged access.
additional_questions.explanation_es: PAM (Privileged Access Management) es un sistema para controlar y auditar acceso privilegiado.

options_en: Extended Detection and Response - integrates data from multiple sources
options_es: Extended Detection and Response - integra datos de multiples fuentes
additional_questions.explanation_en: XDR (Extended Detection and Response) extends EDR by integrating data from network, email, cloud, etc.
additional_questions.explanation_es: XDR (Extended Detection and Response) extiende EDR integrando datos de red, email, nube, etc.

options_en: Using stolen Kerberos tickets to authenticate
options_es: Usar tickets Kerberos robados para autenticarse
additional_questions.explanation_en: Pass-the-Ticket uses stolen Kerberos tickets to authenticate without needing the password.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Pass-the-Ticket usa tickets Kerberos robados para autenticarse sin necesitar la contrasena.

additional_questions.question_en: What Windows artifacts are useful in forensic investigations?
additional_questions.question_es: Que artefactos de Windows son utiles en investigaciones forenses?
options_en: Prefetch, MFT, Registry hives, Event logs, NTUSER.DAT
options_es: Prefetch, MFT, Registry hives, Event logs, NTUSER.DAT
additional_questions.explanation_en: Useful artifacts: Prefetch, MFT, Registry hives, Event logs, NTUSER.DAT, ShimCache.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Artefactos utiles: Prefetch, MFT, Registry hives, Event logs, NTUSER.DAT, ShimCache.

options_en: Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor - rapid forensic artifact collection
options_es: Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor - recoleccion rapida de artefactos forenses
additional_questions.explanation_en: KAPE (Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor) is a tool for rapid forensic artifact collection.
additional_questions.explanation_es: KAPE (Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor) es una herramienta para recoleccion rapida de artefactos forenses.

additional_questions.question_en: What is a Golden Ticket attack?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es un ataque Golden Ticket?
options_en: Forged Kerberos TGT that grants access to any resource in domain
options_es: TGT de Kerberos falsificado que otorga acceso a cualquier recurso del dominio
additional_questions.explanation_en: Golden Ticket is a forged Kerberos TGT that grants access to any resource in the domain.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Golden Ticket es un TGT de Kerberos falsificado que otorga acceso a cualquier recurso del dominio.

additional_questions.question_en: What is the 3-2-1 backup strategy mentioned for ransomware recovery?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual es la estrategia de backup 3-2-1 mencionada para recuperacion de ransomware?
options_es: 3 copias, 2 tipos de medios diferentes, 1 fuera del sitio
additional_questions.explanation_en: The 3-2-1 backup strategy: 3 copies of data, on 2 different media types, with 1 copy offsite.
additional_questions.explanation_es: La estrategia de backup 3-2-1: 3 copias de datos, en 2 tipos de medios diferentes, con 1 copia fuera del sitio.

additional_questions.question_es: Que es un malware sin archivos (fileless)?
options_en: Malware that operates in memory without writing to disk
options_es: Malware que opera en memoria sin escribir a disco
Malware en archivos adjuntos de email
Malware que se elimina a si mismo
additional_questions.explanation_en: Fileless malware operates entirely in memory, making it harder to detect with traditional file-based scanning.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El malware sin archivos opera completamente en memoria, haciendolo mas dificil de detectar con escaneo tradicional basado en archivos.

additional_questions.question_es: Que es el analisis dinamico de malware?
options_en: Running malware in isolated environment to observe behavior
options_es: Ejecutar malware en entorno aislado para observar comportamiento
additional_questions.explanation_en: Dynamic analysis involves executing malware in a controlled environment (sandbox) to observe its behavior.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El analisis dinamico involucra ejecutar el malware en un entorno controlado (sandbox) para observar su comportamiento.

options_en: Malware designed to hide its presence and maintain privileged access
options_es: Malware disenado para ocultar su presencia y mantener acceso privilegiado
additional_questions.explanation_en: A rootkit is malware designed to hide its presence and provide continued privileged access to a system.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Un rootkit es malware disenado para ocultar su presencia y proporcionar acceso privilegiado continuo a un sistema.

options_en: Malware that records keystrokes to capture credentials
options_es: Malware que registra pulsaciones de teclas para capturar credenciales
additional_questions.explanation_en: A keylogger records keystrokes to capture sensitive information like passwords and credit card numbers.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Un keylogger registra pulsaciones de teclas para capturar informacion sensible como contrasenas y numeros de tarjetas de credito.

options_en: Malware that secretly monitors user activity and collects information
options_es: Malware que monitorea secretamente la actividad del usuario y recolecta informacion
additional_questions.explanation_en: Spyware secretly monitors user activity and collects personal information without consent.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El spyware monitorea secretamente la actividad del usuario y recolecta informacion personal sin consentimiento.

options_en: Software that displays unwanted advertisements, often bundled with free software
options_es: Software que muestra anuncios no deseados, frecuentemente incluido con software gratuito
additional_questions.explanation_en: Adware displays unwanted advertisements and is often bundled with free software downloads.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El adware muestra anuncios no deseados y frecuentemente viene incluido con descargas de software gratuito.

options_en: Network of compromised computers controlled remotely by attacker
options_es: Red de computadoras comprometidas controladas remotamente por un atacante
additional_questions.explanation_en: A botnet is a network of infected computers (bots/zombies) controlled by an attacker for malicious purposes like DDoS.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Una botnet es una red de computadoras infectadas (bots/zombies) controladas por un atacante para propositos maliciosos como DDoS.

additional_questions.question_en: What is C2 (Command and Control) in malware context?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es C2 (Command and Control) en el contexto de malware?
options_en: Server/infrastructure used by attackers to communicate with compromised systems
options_es: Servidor/infraestructura usada por atacantes para comunicarse con sistemas comprometidos
additional_questions.explanation_en: C2 (Command and Control) is the infrastructure attackers use to send commands to and receive data from compromised systems.
additional_questions.explanation_es: C2 (Command and Control) es la infraestructura que los atacantes usan para enviar comandos y recibir datos de sistemas comprometidos.

additional_questions.question_en: What should be the first step when ransomware is detected?
additional_questions.question_es: Cual deberia ser el primer paso cuando se detecta ransomware?
options_en: Disconnect infected systems from network to prevent spread
options_es: Desconectar sistemas infectados de la red para prevenir propagacion
additional_questions.explanation_en: First step is to disconnect infected systems from network to prevent ransomware from spreading to other systems.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El primer paso es desconectar sistemas infectados de la red para prevenir que el ransomware se propague a otros sistemas.

options_en: Targeted phishing attack against high-profile executives
options_es: Ataque de phishing dirigido contra ejecutivos de alto perfil
additional_questions.explanation_en: Whaling is spear phishing that specifically targets high-profile individuals like executives, CEOs, or CFOs.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Whaling es spear phishing que se dirige especificamente a individuos de alto perfil como ejecutivos, CEOs o CFOs.

options_en: DNS record that specifies which servers can send email for a domain
options_es: Registro DNS que especifica que servidores pueden enviar email para un dominio
additional_questions.explanation_en: SPF is a DNS TXT record that specifies which mail servers are authorized to send email on behalf of your domain.
additional_questions.explanation_es: SPF es un registro TXT de DNS que especifica que servidores de correo estan autorizados para enviar email en nombre de tu dominio.

options_en: Email authentication protocol that builds on SPF and DKIM
options_es: Protocolo de autenticacion de email que se construye sobre SPF y DKIM
additional_questions.explanation_en: DMARC (Domain-based Message Authentication, Reporting and Conformance) builds on SPF and DKIM to protect against email spoofing.
additional_questions.explanation_es: DMARC (Domain-based Message Authentication, Reporting and Conformance) se construye sobre SPF y DKIM para proteger contra spoofing de email.

options_en: Scam targeting businesses using compromised or spoofed executive email accounts
options_es: Estafa que apunta a empresas usando cuentas de email ejecutivas comprometidas o falsificadas
additional_questions.explanation_en: BEC is a scam where attackers impersonate executives via email to trick employees into transferring money or data.
additional_questions.explanation_es: BEC es una estafa donde atacantes se hacen pasar por ejecutivos via email para engañar a empleados a transferir dinero o datos.

additional_questions.question_en: What email header should be analyzed to trace the email path?
additional_questions.question_es: Que encabezado de email debe analizarse para rastrear la ruta del email?
options_es: Encabezados Received (leer de abajo hacia arriba)
additional_questions.explanation_en: Received headers show the path email took; read from bottom (origin) to top (destination) to trace the route.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Los encabezados Received muestran la ruta que tomo el email; leer de abajo (origen) hacia arriba (destino) para rastrear la ruta.

options_en: Attack that redirects website traffic to fraudulent sites via DNS poisoning
options_es: Ataque que redirige trafico de sitios web a sitios fraudulentos via envenenamiento DNS
additional_questions.explanation_en: Pharming redirects users to fraudulent websites by compromising DNS servers or modifying hosts files.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Pharming redirige usuarios a sitios web fraudulentos comprometiendo servidores DNS o modificando archivos hosts.

options_en: Attack using a copy of legitimate email with malicious links/attachments
options_es: Ataque usando copia de email legitimo con enlaces/adjuntos maliciosos
additional_questions.explanation_en: Clone phishing creates a nearly identical copy of a legitimate email but replaces links or attachments with malicious ones.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Clone phishing crea una copia casi identica de un email legitimo pero reemplaza enlaces o adjuntos con maliciosos.

additional_questions.question_en: What are the four cloud deployment models?
additional_questions.question_es: Cuales son los cuatro modelos de despliegue en la nube?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Four deployment models: Public (shared), Private (dedicated), Hybrid (mix), Community (shared among organizations).
additional_questions.explanation_es: Cuatro modelos de despliegue: Publica (compartida), Privada (dedicada), Hibrida (mezcla), Comunitaria (compartida entre organizaciones).

options_en: Cloud Access Security Broker - enforces security policies between users and cloud services
options_es: Servicio de backup en la nube
Cloud Access Security Broker - aplica politicas de seguridad entre usuarios y servicios en la nube
Bucket de almacenamiento en la nube
additional_questions.explanation_en: CASB sits between users and cloud services to enforce security policies, provide visibility, and ensure compliance.
additional_questions.explanation_es: CASB se situa entre usuarios y servicios en la nube para aplicar politicas de seguridad, proporcionar visibilidad y asegurar cumplimiento.

additional_questions.question_en: In Azure, what is equivalent to AWS CloudTrail?
additional_questions.question_es: En Azure, que es equivalente a AWS CloudTrail?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Azure Activity Log provides logs of operations performed on resources, similar to AWS CloudTrail.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Azure Activity Log proporciona logs de operaciones realizadas en recursos, similar a AWS CloudTrail.

additional_questions.question_en: What is the shared responsibility model in cloud?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es el modelo de responsabilidad compartida en la nube?
options_en: Security responsibilities are divided between cloud provider and customer
options_es: El proveedor de nube maneja todo
Las responsabilidades de seguridad se dividen entre proveedor de nube y cliente
additional_questions.explanation_en: Shared responsibility model: Cloud provider secures infrastructure; customer secures data, access, and configurations.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Modelo de responsabilidad compartida: El proveedor de nube asegura la infraestructura; el cliente asegura datos, acceso y configuraciones.

options_en: Threat detection service that monitors for malicious activity
options_es: Servicio de deteccion de amenazas que monitorea actividad maliciosa
additional_questions.explanation_en: AWS GuardDuty is a threat detection service that continuously monitors for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior.
additional_questions.explanation_es: AWS GuardDuty es un servicio de deteccion de amenazas que monitorea continuamente actividad maliciosa y comportamiento no autorizado.

additional_questions.question_en: What is a VPC in cloud computing?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es una VPC en computacion en la nube?
options_en: Virtual Private Cloud - isolated network within cloud
options_es: Virtual Private Cloud - red aislada dentro de la nube
additional_questions.explanation_en: VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) is a logically isolated network section within a cloud provider's infrastructure.
additional_questions.explanation_es: VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) es una seccion de red logicamente aislada dentro de la infraestructura del proveedor de nube.

additional_questions.question_en: What is S3 bucket misconfiguration a common cause of?
additional_questions.question_es: De que es causa comun la mala configuracion de buckets S3?
options_en: Cloud data breaches due to public exposure
options_es: Brechas de datos en la nube por exposicion publica
additional_questions.explanation_en: Misconfigured S3 buckets with public access are a leading cause of cloud data breaches and data exposure.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Buckets S3 mal configurados con acceso publico son una causa principal de brechas de datos en la nube y exposicion de datos.

options_en: Cloud Workload Protection Platform - protects server workloads
options_es: Cloud Workload Protection Platform - protege cargas de trabajo de servidores
additional_questions.explanation_en: CWPP (Cloud Workload Protection Platform) provides security for server workloads across cloud environments.
additional_questions.explanation_es: CWPP (Cloud Workload Protection Platform) proporciona seguridad para cargas de trabajo de servidores en entornos de nube.

additional_questions.question_en: What tool is mentioned for anti-malware that provides ransomware protection?
additional_questions.question_es: Que herramienta se menciona para anti-malware que proporciona proteccion contra ransomware?
additional_questions.explanation_en: Malwarebytes provides real-time protection including web, malware, ransomware, and exploit protection.
additional_questions.explanation_es: Malwarebytes proporciona proteccion en tiempo real incluyendo web, malware, ransomware y proteccion contra exploits.

additional_questions.question_en: What is a PUP in malware terminology?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es un PUP en terminologia de malware?
additional_questions.explanation_en: PUP (Potentially Unwanted Program) is software that may be unwanted despite user consent, often bundled with other software.
additional_questions.explanation_es: PUP (Programa Potencialmente No Deseado) es software que puede ser no deseado a pesar del consentimiento del usuario, frecuentemente incluido con otro software.

additional_questions.question_en: What is the X-Originating-IP header used for?
additional_questions.question_es: Para que se usa el encabezado X-Originating-IP?
options_en: Shows the IP address of the sender's computer
options_es: Muestra la direccion IP del computador del remitente
additional_questions.explanation_en: X-Originating-IP header reveals the IP address of the computer that sent the email, useful in forensic analysis.
additional_questions.explanation_es: El encabezado X-Originating-IP revela la direccion IP del computador que envio el email, util en analisis forense.

additional_questions.question_en: What is container security in cloud environments?
additional_questions.question_es: Que es la seguridad de contenedores en entornos de nube?
options_en: Protecting containerized applications (Docker, Kubernetes) from vulnerabilities
options_es: Proteger aplicaciones en contenedores (Docker, Kubernetes) de vulnerabilidades
additional_questions.explanation_en: Container security involves protecting containerized applications and their orchestration platforms from vulnerabilities.
additional_questions.explanation_es: La seguridad de contenedores involucra proteger aplicaciones en contenedores y sus plataformas de orquestacion de vulnerabilidades.

additional_questions.question_en: What does IOC stand for in incident response?
additional_questions.question_es: Que significa IOC en respuesta a incidentes?
additional_questions.explanation_en: IOC (Indicator of Compromise) is forensic evidence suggesting a security breach, like file hashes or IP addresses.
additional_questions.explanation_es: IOC (Indicador de Compromiso) es evidencia forense que sugiere una brecha de seguridad, como hashes de archivos o direcciones IP.
